title: bouvardia × hybrida
intro: Bouvardia × hybrida, also known as the Bouvardia or Butterfly Bush, is a flowering shrub native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bouvardia × hybrida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
